record.text:
Spent the day trying to fix my old laptop. It ran 75-80C at idle very recently and I thought redoing the thermal paste would help.

The old paste was pretty dry, no wonder it ran like shit. Now idles between 45 and 60, but seems to spike to the 80s when doing stuff so I'll have to take another look.

images.alt:
Ashenputtel 2/16/2024
Planting fiberglass sticks in a jar
So careful
Fingers gripping poison from afar
So careful
Avoiding burns and washing hands like the Lady
So careful
Dusting clothes and face til it seems shady
So careful
And yet they whisper behind my back
So careful
To not be heard, not be tracked
So careful
When giving me the poison stacked
So careful

About to tilt, to tumble, fall
So fearful
They leave me out to have cabal
So fearful
And so I am given my name
So awful
To soothe the rigid panicked flame
I'm fearful 
I sleep in cinder while they bully
An earful
Arsonist lungs, Ashenputtel they call me
The smell lingers on like death
On skin and hair and even my breath
Even though I've always been
So careful

images.alt:
Geordi and Guinan talking in 10 Forward.

Guinan: "Let me tell you something, when this kid's big brothers come looking for him, they're not gonna stop until they find him. And they'll come looking for us, and they will destroy us. And they will not do any of the soul-searching that you're doing now."
Geordi: "So why don't you go and talk to him? It might not be so clear-cut then."
Guinan: "Because I wouldn't have anything to say."
Geordi: "Then why don't you just listen? That is what you do best, isn't it?"

Picard and Beverly conversing in the same episode:

Beverly: "I just think we should be clear about that. We're talking about annihilating an entire race."
Jean-Luc: "Which under most circumstances would be unconscionable, but as I see it, the Borg leave us with little choice."

record.text: I feel that fine is a mere slap on the wrist for a company that made a gross profit of $8.94B in 2023. Maybe the executives in charge, and all of the leading shareholders, should have been sentenced to eat food from the warehouse for a period of not less than one year.

external.title: Mouse-infested warehouse lands Family Dollar Stores with record $41M fine
external.description: An investigation found “live rodents, dead and decaying rodents, rodent feces, urine and odors,” at a warehouse in Arkansas.

record.text:
well, this has to be the most presumptuous rejection email an employer has given me:

record.text: Lmao it’s true which makes me think of how I was a miracle baby. They told my mom she had a month to prepare for her hysterectomy after 6 years of trying. Then apparently she and my dad had gross straight sex and here I am :)

Just remembering the time The Atlantic (where I was working at the time) published a piece about my doxing, against my will (I begged them not to run it since I was, you know, actively receiving death threats) that began with a fictional "more civil" dialogue between me and people on the internet.

record.text: Brandon Lee starred in a fantastic adaptation of someone else's work. I love that movie more than you could comprehend but it changed a LOT from the source material. Some would say they changed almost everything except the character names. I love it and the novel it's based on for different reasons.

A note for buddies who take commissions, try to have your commission info as easily accessible as possible. Generally people aren't going to bother digging for more than a few minutes before they give up. Without pinned posts, I'd say have a link in your bio to wherever your info is.
